entry.title: Re: My experience in digital skills initiative
entry.content:
Hi @NiteeshReddy ,

Congratulations on passing your exam! Can you please keep us updated on the job search?

Regarding the additional study materials, it is noted. However, providing that much commercial content for free would be quite difficult to scale. 

More free content is being moved to learning.sap.com all the time.

entry.title: Re: Embed mode not working for optimized story
entry.content:
@Susanne_Helbig

Ok thanks. Present mode is something completely different and no option for me. In my opinion the Embed mode should the standard mode in SAC. The view mode with toolbar and filters only adjustable for specific users, so the present mode.

entry.title: Re: Consuming external API from Ui5 application in S4 on...
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer 

Yes. I saw the blog post you have mentioned. Here it mentioned about getting the meta data file (EDMX file) of the API so that wizard will create the SCM.

"You will now create the Service Consumption Model in ADT, using the EDMX file - i.e. the $metadata.xml file that you stored locally" .

My question is how to extract the meta data file for the API developed in Spring boot and deployed in Azure K8 cluster.

Regards,

Ratheesh BS

entry.title: Re: Which BAPI can update POD relevance on sales order cr...
entry.content:
Hi YJJ,
What S/4HANA Version do you have? We have different APIs for different channels.
The A2X service I mentioned in the first reply should be used, if you want to change the sales order from an external system.

You can find further information on when to use what API here. For internal purpose you should use the Business Object Interface I_SalesOrderTP to change Sales Orders. But as far as I can see, the field SlsDocIsRlvtForProofOfDeliv is only available on header level, but not on item level. This needs to be requested via feature request here for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: SAP Process Automation - Opening PDF file unhandled exception in case of BadStreamError
entry.content: Please, check, whether it might be useful: https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js/issues/11207

entry.title: Need to schedule a maintenance order on particular date of the month
entry.content:
Need to schedule a maintenance order on particular date of the month like 6th and 21st which should have completion requirement.

I tried creating a factory calender with only 6th and 21st as work days. yet while i schedule the order i get the below error.

Calculated date is after end of factory calendar ZZ; maintenance plan 263 Message no. IP733

entry.title: Enter all components from 08 into the transfer structure (source)
entry.content:
Hi team

I can't clear the code of CK11n  Enter all components from 08 into the transfer structure (source)
Message No. KQ355. can you help me

Regards

Aswanth

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Applications with Approuter: Sessions and Automatic Logout
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm using oData V4 model ( see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.ui.model.odata.v4.ODataModel%23methods/Summary ) for which method attachRequestCompleted does not exist anymore. Should I just use attachDataReceived instead or is there a better way to manage session ending with oData V4 (I saw a new method attachSessionTimeout ) ?

entry.title: Re: Incorrect DG Status in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Marianne,

Thank you for your response. I have already set the product master to "Compliance Relevant" = "yes". Additionally, I have checked the configuration for our on-premises system:

Activated the business feature "Dangerous Goods Integration into Value Chain" in the IMG under Product Compliance --> Integration.
These settings have already been applied, but the issue persists. Could there be another setting or configuration that I might be missing?

Best regards,
Ajit

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio - License - Access
entry.content:
Hi Satish,

It's great you chose SAP Signavio to transform your business processes.
We have set up the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center (https://support.sap.com/en/product/onboarding-resource-center/sap-signavio.html?anchorId=section_1032133721) to provide answers to your questions below.

From what I see, your questions 2-5 are covered there.

Regarding your question 1: 
I am sure you're having a specific use case in front of you. Depending on this use case and its objectives, you will require specific SAP Signavio solution capabilities. These solution capabilities might be part of one or more SAP Signavio Suite components that you will need to license.
You can license the SAP Signavio Transformation Suite components separately / in combinations.

The approach to get the license is to reach out to your SAP Signavio Account Executive who is your go-to-person for any individual requests.
If you don't know who that person is, please reach out (internally) to your SAP team or drop me a personal message (robert.huefler@sap.com) stating your customer name, location and full name.

Together with your SAP Signavio Account Executive, you will be able to identify what licenses and how many of them you will need to work on your use case.

I hope this will also answer your question 1.

Best,
Robert

entry.title: Re: Cannot select destination for live data run configura...
entry.content: At the time of this post the issue remains unsolved.

entry.title: Calling APIs from S/4 to SF/EC using Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are working in a project in which we need to do API calls (post and gets) from S/4 to SuccessFactors/Employee Central(SF/EC).
We have a BTP account already set, with Cloud Connector already configured and CPI as well (this last one will be used to replicate data from SF/EC to S/4).
Client has some security concerns when it comes to the usage of direct API calls from S/4 to SF/EC ( he says that he is afraid of getting hacked and so, does not want to expose the API calls, we wants to "hide" the API calls to the outside), so, he requested us to use Cloud Connector when communicating between S/4 and SF/EC.
I have searched and could not find a way to make use of the Cloud Connector, when it comes to API calls from S/4 to SF/EC (EC will be the server in this case).
Could anyone advise if it's possible to use Cloud Connector for this purpose?
If not, can anyone propose any other approach (using CPI as a middleware and creating a Proxy there, for example)?
Thank you in advance.

PS: I have limited knowledge when it comes to BASIS/Integration Topics.

entry.title: Re: IMP Function Module List of EWMS
entry.content: Where is the attachment?

entry.title: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the speaker registration for SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition, happening on July 6th, 2024! This year, our focus is on the transformative power of SAP Business AI, and we are looking for passionate speakers to share their expertise and insights across various tracks. If you have experience in building AI applications, creating innovative Business AI solutions, or working with Embedded AI in SAP products, we invite you to contribute to our event.

Event Details:

Date: July 6th, 2024
Time: 8 AM - 5 PM IST
Venue: SAP Labs India, 138, SAP Labs Rd, EPIP Zone, Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066
 
Find more about the event in the announcement blog post: SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 - Business AI Edition - Announcement 

Speaker Tracks for your proposal:

Track 2: Building AI Applications on SAP BTP
Dive into the technicalities of building AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Demonstrate how developers and architects can leverage SAP BTP to create robust AI solutions that drive business value.

Track 3: Business AI Solutions from Ecosystem - Partners & Customers
Showcase successful AI solutions developed by SAP partners and customers. Share case studies, implementation experiences, and collaborative projects that highlight the innovative use of Business AI within the SAP ecosystem.

Track 4: Embedded AI across Solutions - SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors & Other SAP Products
Explore the integration of Embedded AI in various SAP products like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, CX, and more. Discuss how these intelligent features are transforming business processes and enhancing user experiences.

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 - Business AI Edition?

  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with a passionate and engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Enhance your professional profile and gain recognition within the SAP community

How to Register:

Ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition? Register now to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most exciting SAP community events of the year.

Speaker Registration Link: https://forms.gle/DbxTfpqHSf8KWW6z5

Next Steps: Once you submit your proposal,
Step 1: Our expert team will go through your proposal and if it is shortlisted, we will contact your for more details.
Step 2: This will again be discussed internally with the experts and once shortlisted, we will inform you about the next steps – like presentation format, social media advertisement etc.,

We look forward to your valuable contributions and to seeing you at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024!

Best Regards,
Mahesh

entry.title: Is there any flag to find unverified and verified phone numbers in SAP CDC?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there any flag which decides if the mobile number is verified or not?

Thanks

Rohit

entry.title: Re: Dynamically Reading Blobs from Azure Blob Storage to CPI
entry.content:
Hey @abhinavsingh04,

Thanks for dropping a comment. Just realized I missed out on mentioning the HTTP method earlier. Looks like the error you're running into might be because of using the wrong method. Make sure to use 'GET' as your method in the HTTP adapter.

Cheers,

Nic Frigius

entry.title: Correlating output of sp_spaceused procedure
entry.content:
We have an use-case to show table level space metrics. We came across 'sp_spaceused' and want to understand the metrics it shows like reserved, data, unused and index size.
The info doc says "The amount of space allocated (reserved) reported by sp_spaceused is a total of the data, index size, and available (unused) space."

https://infocenter.sybase.com/help/index.jsp?topic=/com.sybase.infocenter.dc36273.1572/html/sprocs/X50477.htm

But when trying it out, it is not the case (screenshot below for reference).

Am I missing something here?

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content:
Hello,

I have exactly the same problem. In the Certification Hub said that you have to link 2 emails accounts with different domain. My main account is "gmail.com" but I tried to added an "outlook.com" and get the same issue (The 2 linked emails are gmail, so I guess that is why I am getting the error message).

I had created a ticket one week ago and still in progress.

I only want to take my exam and get my certification!

Thanks in advance.

entry.content:
Dear Community,

When I try to clear customer down payments in F-39, an error message appears saying that no down payments exist But it is showing as an open item in FBl5N. Could you please provide me with a solution for this?

Thanks

Regards,

Bharath

entry.title: Re: How to assign custom payslip to My Paystubs App in FI...
entry.content:
Hi Shashi,

You can do it using sap-note 2825043 : https://me.sap.com/notes/0002825043

PE03 HRFOR = HRFORM

Cheers,

Fabrice

entry.title: Sac - Get all dimension comment from a table
entry.content:
hi Expert, 

i need to retrieve all "dimension comments" in a table via javascript.

i tried the following code: 

var a = Table_Input.getComments().getDimensionComment(Table_Input.getSelections()[0]);
console.log(a);

This code works if I select the single row. But what if I need to retrieve a complete array of the table?

Any suggestion? 

thanks a lot

SAP Analytics Cloud  #dimensioncomment

entry.title: Re: SAP API Business Hub is now SAP Business Accelerator Hub
entry.content:
Hi Koni,

I am glad you figured out how to fix your API Business Hub Enterprise setup.

However API Business Hub Enterprise is not the website https://api.sap.com They are two very different product, one is a developer portal another a web catalog.

Warm regards

aadi

entry.title: Change documents for standard networks (CN01/02) aren't created
entry.content:
Dear all,

as you can in the subject, we are wondering why no change documents are created when creating a standard network with CN01 or changing it with CN02. SCDO shows an entry for PLAN but nevertheless CN61 stays empty. Any ideas where to look?

regards
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Central Procurement Approval Workflow based on Accoun...
entry.content: Hi, according to your answer, I now see what you want. No, this is not given at CP Central PR approval.

entry.title: Does monProcessActivity CPUTime and monEngine CPUTime correlate?
entry.content:
I'm currently working with Sybase Adaptive Server Enterprise (ASE) and I came across two metrics: monProcessActivity.CPUTime and monEngine.CPUTime. I am trying to understand if these two metrics correlate and how they might be used together for effective system monitoring.

We want to monitor the CPU usage to optimize performance and identify any potential bottlenecks. Here’s how we're using these metrics:

monProcessActivity.CPUTime: Tracks the CPU time consumed by individual processes. We use this to understand which specific processes are consuming the most CPU resources.
monEngine.CPUTime: Tracks the overall CPU time consumed by the database engine. This gives us a broader view of the CPU usage by the entire database engine.

entry.title: Error related logs from Sybase
entry.content: I'm currently working with Sybase Adaptive Server Enterprise (ASE) and need to locate the database error logs for troubleshooting purposes. Specifically, I need to understand the default location of these logs and how to verify or change this location if necessary.

entry.title: Re: Trigger START-OF-SELECTION on clicking custom refresh button though RELEABL3 program enhancement
entry.content: This does not look like a Connectivity question (HTTP or RFC communication). I am adding the "ABAP Development" tag.

entry.title: Re: Trigger START-OF-SELECTION on clicking custom refresh button though RELEABL3 program enhancement
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi: perhaps you can turn your "comment" into an "answer", as it apparently answers the question?

entry.title: 999 line items issue per FI document
entry.content:
Hello All, 

When we try to release billing document to accounting and getting an error message as 'max number of 999 line items' are generated message. I have googled it and didn't find the concrete answer and below options won't work for us and would like to know any other custom solution options are available. 

1. Split billing document into multiple billing document - This option is not acceptable option. 

2. Tried with Summarization profile but Material number is coming as blank in BSEG and we need material number in BSEG and other reports are using the BSEG table and we can't change it this one. 

Please let us know if we have any other options .

entry.title: A material is extended to new plant and storage location but it is redirecting to free freight
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client have extend a "xyz" material to 1800 and 2000 plant & storage location. Before this item is used as free shipment or with no frieght but after extending it new plant they want to charge freight for that item. But it is still picking free freight for every order they make, even in ecom it is showing as 0$ for all freight.

Every order defaults to FF free freight in  customer group 1 in additional data header details. I have tried to maintain condition record with this combination but this is affecting other ecom orders, so i have deleted this condition record. 

IF only the order default to PPA Prepaid & add in customer group1 in additonal data, then i can maintain the condition record and i feel it will work. where can i look for this setting and please feel free to suggest your solution.

Note: Customer is one time customer in ECom.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Update Member properties of SAC model via API
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

Our business requirement is to send details from SAC to SF , But we want to also update the member status of the data was send successfully to SF .

I am aware about the export API, Could you let me know if this is possible for we can update a member's details via an API from external middleware like SAP CPI?

entry.title: Re: Can I assign a general commodity code if the commodit...
entry.content: Hello! Did you find a solution to this? We have the same issue regarding a different process. Could you please let us know if you find a solution for not assigned commodity code?

entry.title: Edit Calculation not enabled in sap sac story created from others
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am new to SAC space and I have full admin access in SAC .

I am able to create and edit calculations  what i created  story's but I am unable to edit calculation ( Fx , below screen  ) which is some other developers created story's . 

Please advise what is the cause and advise if any inputs to edit calculations created from others  .

Thanks,

Chanti

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2022: New BAdI to influence MRP elements in MRP Live and Classic MRP
entry.content:
@Caetano   - Thanks for sharing this, indeed so much insights on the latest offering from SAP on MRP Live topic.

We tried using  this new BADI to avoid consolidating Customer orders under same delivery date into single PREQ during MRP Live execution (MTS scenario), but no luck . In fact, when we checked the table CT_SUPPLYDEMANDITEMLIST in debug mode before our custom code execution, its still considering consolidated Requirements per delivery date. I believe this topic had been discussed multiple times in the forum and suggested solution was to use old BADI MD_ADD_ELEMENTS (modifying the MDPS-Plannr field) back then. Did you face this similar issue or recall any similar instance while implementing this new BADI ? Really appreciate your response, Thanks.

Data setup - Planning Strategy as blank in Material Master , Requirement type as '011' (Delivery Requirement) determined in all the Sales orders (Using S/4HANA for Fashion and Vertical Business). SAP S/4HANA MM (Materials Management) MAN Material Requirements Planning

entry.title: Re: How to insert a record in custom business object from...
entry.content: Please note that the above link is wrong, please use this one https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/5769d4c3e91546199c3980a5546324d1.html?state=TEST&version=2408.500

entry.title: RAP: Side Effect for a whole table
entry.content:
Hello Community,

So far, I have only ever applied side effects to individual fields. But can they also be used to create entire entities in child tables?

My Example:

In this example, I have a field of a root entity in the creation process. If something is entered in this field using the value help, for example. The table below (child entity) should be filled out. There may be several items that need to be entered here. Normally, of course, the user should click on the Create button and create the child entity themselves, but sometimes there is already data in the SAP system with which the table can be filled. 

regards,

Lars

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA - Variant Configuration, Does it require extra license ?
entry.content:
Dear All, 

Does the use of Variant configuration require extra license as per the below from the process navigator ? 


Thanks in advance

entry.title: Join Us at SuccessConnect in Lisbon - October 28-30, 2024
entry.content:
Join Pre- and Post-Conference Trainings

This year's event will feature both pre-conference and post-conference training. These training courses are an excellent opportunity for your customers to take their SuccessConnect experience to the next level and gain comprehensive knowledge of the SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite.

  • Our pre-conference trainings will be delivered on Monday October 28th from 9AM to 1PM (Western European Time, Lisbon/Portugal Time Zone). Click here to view your pre-conference training options.
  • Our post-conference trainings will be delivered on Wednesday October 30th from 2PM to 6PM (Western European Time, Lisbon/Portugal Time Zone). Click here to view your pre-conference training options.

Please note conference training courses have an additional cost of €440. You can book and pay for your session during the event registration process. The deadline to register for pre- and post- conference training sessions is Wednesday, October 23rd at 11 PM CET.

 

Experience Hands-on Labs Sessions

During the main event, there is no better way to enhance your learning experience than with hands-on lab sessions. Discover how to configure and use our products while practicing in a pre-configured environment and getting your questions answered in real time.

Topics include:

  • creating compelling report stories, optimizing position management in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central,
  • writing business rules to automate processes with the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central solution,
  • working with the latest version of goal management,
  • leveraging the latest innovations of the integrated learner experience,
  • automating HR processes with business rules in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central.

Do not miss our new and exciting hands-on lab challenge to navigate the employee lifecycle and race to the finish line with other HCM professionals.

Please note that registration is required for hands-on lab sessions. Space is limited so speakers have time to answer attendee questions.

 

Register for SuccessConnect in Lisbon

Learn more about the in-person experience

entry.title: Re: Payment Term configuration not obtaining the desired...
entry.content:
Hi Victoria,

I suggest you to check this blog, I think you be able to achieve what you are looking for going through it.

I hope this helps.

BR,

Filipe

entry.title: Automating Purchase Order Creation from Purchase Requisition in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: How can we automatically create a Purchase Order from a Purchase Requisition when the associated Sales Order has a net price less than a certain configurable amount in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud? We are aware of the option using iFlows through BTP and APIs, but is there a better way to automate this directly in S/4HANA, given that application jobs do not provide parameters around price?

entry.title: How to get geolocation data through CDS view?
entry.content:
Hello guys,

for a dashboard we need to add in the geomap in the SAP Analytics Cloud. For this we've created a custom Query and custom cds views.

For the geolocation data we query it in a dimension like so:

define view ZD_SD_CUSTLOC as select from geot005 {
    @Semantics.address.country: true
    key land1 as Country,
    @Semantics.geoLocation.longitude: true
    longitude,
    @Semantics.geoLocation.latitude: true
    latitude,
    altitude
}

Sadly, when tryign to use these as a Location Dimension in a geomap, we simply get the warning "Location Dimension required", with the list of the associated objects being empty.

What is needed that the Dimension gets recognized as a Location Dimension?

entry.title: Re: Error assigning users to roles in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Thanks Dolores, I did it via BTP cockpit

entry.title: Re: Coupons not showing in SAP Customer Checkout
entry.content: This is the right way.

Hi,
I use the Java code to update the message.But i got the "?" when update the Japanse message.
What should i do?

BR

entry.title: Connecting SAP Build apps trail version with the S/4 hana system
entry.content:
While we are connecting or integrating the sap Build apps trail version with our S/4 hana system. It is giving below error. Our s/4 hana is on-premise system.

"Request failed with status code 503 There is no SAP Cloud Connector (SCC) connected to your subaccount matching the requested tunnel for subaccount "3c89b0b6-7ab0-44be-9217-e7ba4f777f97" and SCC location ID "Test". Check the configuration on SCC and cloud side."

entry.title: Re: Custom Data Event not capturing the data content (fro...
entry.content:
I have faced similar issue. After debugging I found that the provided FM /ASADEV/ACI_GEN_VIEW_FORMATTER have a small bug. It is not returning any data from CDS view provided in the screen. Copied the FM to Z FM and did small correction and it started working as expected.

Put the highlighted code after ENDIF. Somehow IF condition was failing and this code was never executed. Keeping it out of the if condition made it executed all the time.

Maintain Z FM instead of standard FM in configuration.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Ravish

entry.title: Re: generating qrcode using image url in crystal report
entry.content:
See listing of 3rd-party UFLs here: 
https://kenhamady.com/productlinks/default.html#ufl

entry.title: Fiori Elements: Value Help hidden
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Is it possible to hide a value help?

This is the actual possibility of assigning a value help to a field:

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ { entity: { name: 'Z_ValueHelp', element: 'field' } } ]

 Unfortunately there is not the possibility to add 'hidden' there, so like this:

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ { entity: { name: 'Z_ValueHelp', element: 'field' }, hidden: #( true/false ) } ]

 Or does anyone have an idea how something like this could be implemented?

regards

Lars

entry.title: Re: SAP CI XI Adapter Exception Handling
entry.content: Tune the payload handling so conversion issues in the XSLT do not happen at runtime.  Also, we haven't seen your flow which should include appropriate exception handling for your use case.

entry.title: Re: Calling a procedure with table input on HANA in a CAP Node.js handler
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

a year later, is there a better and more efficient way?

entry.title: Where can I start learning the transactional and analytical security needs in SAP BW/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing Authorizations in SAP BW/4HANA learning journey

Overview
This learning journey will enable you to implement Authorizations in SAP BW/4HANA.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants and administrators will be able to:

  • Differentiate between transactional and analytical security needs in SAP BW/4HANA
  • Create and maintain Analysis Authorizations
  • Create authorizations for Data Modelers and Data Load Administrators
  • Trace Standard and Analysis Authorizations 

Prerequisites

  • Getting Started Building an On-Premise Data Warehouse using SAP BW/4HANA

 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Consuming external API from Ui5 application in S4 on...
entry.content:
If the service supports the OData protocol you will retrieve the $metadata file by adding /$metadata to the root URL of the OData service. 
So for example http://myhost/service_root_url/$metadata 

When using http://myhost/service_root_url the service should respond with the so called service document that simply lists all entities of an OData service.

entry.title: Re: Anyone at SAPPHIRE looking for consulting roles?
entry.content:
Venkata,
Hi! The information from your reply above is helpful... Keep in mind that any job/career search is a journey. With that said, here are a few comments/suggestions...

  • Leverage Current Expertise: Project management and Enterprise Architecture are very good skills and experiences to leverage... Many SAP implementations have 3rd party technology as well so your experience there is positive.
  • Narrow the Field: Consider narrowing down the "Migration to the Cloud"... It's a big topic... There are "major" product/solution/technologies at a high level: Cloud ERP, Spend Management, Business Network, SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP Business Technology Platform (including Data, Analytics, AI), HCM, etc... Each is huge. Plus there's Industry focus. While you can consider all areas... focus in on what interests you and where your skills/experiences take you. 

To get direct experience... a few suggestions...

  1. Network: Start engaging with and talking to those with experience at an "informational discussion" level... Perhaps your university as an alumni... the SAP Community... LinkedIn... your current network, and outreach can help you make meaningful connections, which shed the light on their journey... what they do know and going forward... and how they got their job...lessons learned, etc.
  2. Are you working now? Does your current company do anything with SAP product/solution/technology? You may want to get in with a company (partner or customer) that has an SAP practice (or activities)... but start with your current expertise and then take an interest in the SAP practice (e.g., shadow a project manager, EA, etc.)...
  3. Get Started: There are free SAP software trials that you can try now... FYI: I once used it to write a series of blogs, No-Code Guide: SAP S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Build Apps Data Visibility, which were helpful to build confidence and make many connections. 
  4. Note: Don't depend on job postings as a primary (only) source. Identify 5 - 10 companies that interest you and keep networking towards them. 

There are multiple aspects to the SAP ecosystem... SAP, partners, and customers, etc.... Another way is to work with a customer doing what you do best.... but taking an interest in the SAP work... For example...an SAP Cloud Analytics project (as part of SAP BTP) could have technology you know plus SAP technology, products, solutions...

Of course...nothing about a job search that is easy. Sure it's great if you get a referral, but either way it takes O R C.... Optimism... Resilience... and Chipping away.

Good luck... feel free to post in 2 or 3 weeks with your progress!

Regards,
Rich
SAP Consultant / Author

entry.title: Re: Revolutionizing CAP Applications with AI: Introducing the SAP CAP LLM Plugin
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing. I wonder whether this plugin is officially provided by SAP, how well it fulfills SAP product standards and whether this open source or closed source. In case it is open source, where is the main repository?

Thanks, Kai

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation- Right way to process a JSON array
entry.content:
I have a payload where I am getting of list of regions with a list of approvers for each region. For example - 

regions": [  "region": "USA","regionapprovers": [ { "approver": "djohnson@xyz.io" }, { "approver": "adavis@xyz.io" } ]]

Now I would like to process the above JSON Array into BPA and send an approval email for each region to get approval from at least one approver. 

What is the right way to implement this?

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: Exploring ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP)
entry.content:
Hi Milton,

I wanted to thank you for your excellent blog; it’s incredibly useful for beginners. I have a small suggestion: if possible, could you include the code for all your views and behavior definitions? This would help learners quickly copy, paste, and start practicing hands-on.

Thank you again for your great work.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements: Value Help hidden
entry.content: What good is a hidden value help for a user?

entry.title: Re: Restrict release of production order if no cost exist...
entry.content:
Thanks Jerry,

I will check implementation of "BD_MFGORDER_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE" BADI

entry.title: Where is field CMPSB in S4Hana
entry.content:
Hi All

While working on ATC I got to a field that was not mapped from VBUK to VBAK. The field  is CMPSB - Dynamic check

Does anyone know where is the Dynamic check found in S/4HANA?

Thanks

Andrea

entry.title: OData development & Registration on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi,

We currently having a centralized deployment [Hub Model] of SAP Gateway , wherein we develop and register OData services. Since we are having an objective to replace the on-premise SAP Gateway instance during the cloud migration, we would like to know whether  any BTP services are available for OData development & registration in cloud . Not sure whether OData provisioning services is meant for that?

Kindly advice.

Regards,

entry.title: Emails are not working / JOB SERVİCES
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

After upgrading, our alerts work but our emails do not. Can you help me?

LOG;

entry.title: Re: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I think there is some issue with the SAP BPA.
We are also facing the same error today.

entry.title: Re: Screenshot not working (Android)
entry.content: This. "Take screenshot" in marketplace is available?

entry.title: What are possible categories for integration monitoring?
entry.content:
I want to retrieve the integration logs from ALM by using the Raw Data Outbound Logs API. According to the documentation it is mandatory to filter for "category" and it is mentioned to check the "Integration & Exception Monitoring"UI for those categories, compare:

In old screenshot I can see these categories in the UI, while ALM active on our account, these categories are not displayed anymore. Therefore my question: Where can I find all possible categories for integration monitoring?

Kind regards

Nikolai

entry.title: Re: Change System Status in PM order dependend to order Type
entry.content: Hello @MTerence, with one order type the order will be released automatically, the other one is not. There is no error. I want the order (with both order types) to be automatically in REL status after creating it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One as adress book for MS Teams
entry.content:
hi @gilhan , 

An integration with MS Teams is already supported (as mentioned in the other answer), however not the specific feature you mentioned.

I recommend that you create an Improvement Request (IR) in the Customer Influence Portal describing the requested feature. 

This way other interested partners and customers will be able to vote for it and help promote it's priority.

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: Ways to Fix a Freight Order
entry.content:
Hello @former_member194808 

how it is possible to setup /SCMTMS/TOR_FO_PROC_BATCH  that for example all Freight Orders on the departure day can be fixed  through a batch job?

I could not find in the menu a selection for the dates.

Thanks.

Kind regards,

Sanjoy Biswas

entry.title: Warehouse management app for inventory overview
entry.content:
Hi 

I just want to check if someone in community have a good app to get an overview of inventory count document in warehouse? For the Inventory management IM count there is the "Manage physical inventory count" but I haven´t managed to find something similar for warehouse count? 

Please let me know if there is some good app to use

Regards

Lisa

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning api to Derive Controllin...
entry.content:
You can get the selected value from the input control and a planning model.

var cc_member = CostCenter_Input.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembers();
var cc_md = planning_model1.getMember("CostCenter",cc_member.id);

 Now the cc_md has the controlling area in the "properties" array/dict, which you can extract to use in your commenting widget.

entry.title: Re: Fixed asset migration cockpit FAA_MD 207
entry.content: I am also facing the same issue even though I have mentioned the capitalization date in the ledger tab in master data

entry.title: Re: How to create Index
entry.content: What about search indexes/join optimisation on custom fields ? non-unique values constraint ?

entry.title: Re: Fixed asset migration cockpit FAA_MD 207
entry.content: Meanwhile I solved it.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements: Value Help hidden
entry.content: Good point. But in this case, the user doesn't need it because they have to enter something completely new in the field. If he were to select something from the ValueHelp, an error message would appear because the entry already exists.

entry.title: Re: Fixed asset migration cockpit FAA_MD 207
entry.content: Meanwhile I solved it. Any customizing issue can be in the backgroumd, the asset class config is missing for the valuation area. This is, what the customizing transaction DOES NOT DO correctly the copy and sometimes the hanging entries are NOT copied.

entry.title: Re: How to Integrate Tricentis Test Automation tool with...
entry.content:
Hi @Nilabh_ ,

Thanks for the above comment. 
You could also tag the above information in a blog, so that more users can come across this and utilize this information.

Thanks
Anurag

entry.title: Wrong GL is debited in Landing Cost JE
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
In SAP landed cost, after posting it, amount goes into the Expenses account (Material Price /Difference.) in case of Item is not in stock.
 
We have checked that, the stock is in the store for same batches. But still amount is added to Material Price /Difference.
 
What could be the reason. Please guide on the same.
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Re: 999 line items issue per FI document
entry.content:
Hell @sateeshkankanampati 

Refer to the note 3308049 - Error message F5 727 / F5727 overview / how-to scenarios for details and possible workarounds. 

If you are already on S/4HANA, see the note 2591291 - FAQ S/4HANA: Error F5 727 when posting via Accounting Interface

If SD billing document split is not an option, then see the note 2078335 - ECC FAQ: Error F5 727 when posting via Accounting Interface, point. 2.3. Document split in FI.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Bank Reconciliation using SAP standard tempate in FIO...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

there are two options, either you fill that information in the Assignment field of each of the bank statement line items or you do not use the assignment but the document number from the journal entries.

 

So option 1:

Navigate into each item:

Add the assignment reference in the assignment field:

 

 

Option 2:

You enter the document number into each memo line:

 

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: How to change storage bin and type in outbound delivery ?
entry.content:
Dear Friends ,

I'm using 
1 ) BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE : for update quantity , For existing record .
2 ) L_TO_CREATE_DN  : for create TO for outbound delivery .
3 ) L_TO_CONFIRM  : for confirm TO generated by Bapi "L_TO_CREATE_DN" .
4 ) WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE : for creating PGI .

Is there any way  BAPI to change the Storage bin and type for batch item in outbound delivery .

Please help me on this .

Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: Re: Warehouse management app for inventory overview
entry.content:
Hello @Lisa_Ahlgren 

This is all there is in terms of physical inventory reporting in LE-WM:

Other than that, you would need to implement a custom report.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: How to change storage bin and type in outbound delivery ?
entry.content: Would you describe your requirements in details, providing business justification and screenshots maybe. Typically such updates are not necessary.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse management app for inventory overview
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn

Yes this from ECC I´m all familiar with and want to find something similar in Cloud,

maybe I missed to mention that the system is SAP S/4 Public Cloud.

Any suggestions?

//Lisa

entry.title: Re: How to generate a wrapper for function modules (BAPIs) in tier 2
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer, It was fantastic information. We will start using this tool going forward. Thanks so much. I have tried this tool using Function Module SATC_CI_GET_RESULT which actually failed with Syntax Errors. I corrected them manually but just want to bring to your notice so that the bug can be fixed.  There are two export parameters with type "i " which are not actually defined in the Interface by the tool but referenced in the Class. I changed it from ZIF_WRAP_SATC~i to just "i" and it worked fine. 

Let me know if you need more information.

entry.title: Create new report/period in SAP Disclosure Management (manually or using roll foward)
entry.content:
I have to build a report (datacache/word) for the Group and 50 other companies in the group. The structures of both are very similar (datacache/word), apart from some notes and the data that the datacache must present from each one.
I thought of two alternatives:
1- create the main one (group - datacache/word) and then copy both to new ones (datacache/word) that would use each company (unit), which would help with the profile, but I would have to manually replace each datalink in the word chapter (200 tables each one 50 company) because they would have a link to a different datacache.
2- use the roll forward function and create a specific period for each company (2024_EMP100, 2024_EMP200, etc.), so there would be no need to replace all the datalinks in the word chapters, as the roll forward would do this.
Please, what would be the most appropriate/recommended thing to do, or would I have another option?

Thanks,

Felipe

SAP Disclosure Management @olga_vasilieva @Marc_Kuipers

entry.title: Re: GRC Master User id Mapping
entry.content:
Hi Plaban

You can use Master IDs in general for ARA for ABAP connectors too. The point is how you populate the GRACUSERMAP table. For SFEC the table is populated automatically based as part of repo synch if you user parameter 1055. As you can check in the parameter guide below the parameter is intended for SuccessFacotors Connector:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ACCESS_CONTROL/6c75bb80954e4543b4a4dfb68d6a4998/fe8f5e0ad44c4ca2a19cd8e1a3669159.html

"This parameter allows you to specify the connectors for Success Factors for which the field mapping for the field SAP_USER_ID will be considered in the Repository synchronization. The Field Mapping must be in place for the Field SAP_USER_ID for the connector group for Success Factors connector, only then it will work along with this parameter."

entry.title: Re: BTP Trial-Intgration suite deleted today
entry.content:
The same issue in my BTP Trial... Integration Suite deleted, but SAP Application Studio remain available... and my BTP expires in 17 days, not today!!!

And I've some test interfaces with test development on it!!!

entry.title: Overview Page Card Navigation overwritten with Metadata Extension - Problem
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

in F2828 - Maintenance Planning Overview I changed the navigation of the card overdue Orders via Metadata Extension like this in Eclipse ADT:

 

@Metadata.layer: #CUSTOMER
annotate view C_OverdueMaintenanceOrderQ with
{
  @Consumption.semanticObject: 'MaintenanceOrder' 
  @ui.identification: [
    { type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION,
      semanticObjectAction: 'displayFactSheetCUSTOM',
      label: 'Overdue Maintenance Order' }]
  MaintenanceOrder;
}

 

now when clicking on the header of the card I go to F2175 instead of the standard F2173. 

So far everythings fine. But now I have a second Overview page for a different Team and they want the standard behaviour for the overdue orders. But since the metadata extension tells the card to use the semantic action "displayFactSheetCUSTOM" the same target definition is used and an error is displayed "Navigation to this application is not supported." since the target definition is in a different catalog.

How can I seperate this so the metadata extension only works for one specific app/card and not another?

entry.title: Re: BTP Trial-Intgration suite deleted today
entry.content: I found the same issue in: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/integration-suite-instance-deleted-from-trial-although-trial-account/qaq-p/13617876

entry.title: Connection string Crystal reports in SAP B1 HANA version 10 - Calculation views
entry.content:
Hi All
Please can you help. We upgrade to version 10 (had many delays). The connection in the crystal reports needed to change, and it works for the layouts or reports where command/query is based on tables. I am having issues now changing the reports where the command is based on a calculation view, I tried creating a connection string without specifying a schema and I get this error: 

Anyone have an idea on the connection string to connect to the calculation views?
Thank you
Jerusha

entry.title: Re: Problem with SAP Build Process Automation(Trial insta...
entry.content:
Dear Community members,

The deployment should be working now. 

Best,

Jesse on behalf of the team

entry.title: Re: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear Community members,

The deployment should be working now.

Best,

Jesse on behalf of the team

entry.title: Re: Error related logs from Sybase
entry.content:
Find the current name and location of the errorlog:

 

select @@errorlog

 

Default location when ASE is initially built:

 

${SYBASE}/${SYBASE_ASE}/install/<ase_instance_name>.log

 

Default location when ASE is started will be defined in the runserver file, default name and location:

 

${SYBASE}/${SYBASE_ASE}/install/RUN_<ase_instance_name>

 

To change the location of the errorlog while ASE is up and running:

 

sp_errorlog 'change log', '/new/path/to/ASE/errorlog'

 

To change the location of the errorlog while ASE is shutdown - edit the runserver file to point to a new location.

entry.title: Re: where will get TTA admin credentails after TTA server...
entry.content:
Hi

you can find all the information related to the TTA Server and the default admin credentials in the documentation of the TTA Server: Server-based user administration (tricentis.com)

Please have a look at this link. If you still have any open questions please open a ticket via SAP4Me with the Component: XX-PART-TRI-TTA-SOL

Thanks

entry.title: Consignment Process Using MRP Area
entry.content:
In this blog, I am sharing my experience with a requirement where the same material can be procured through both direct Procurement and Consignment Processes using the Planning Process.  The aim is to assist newcomers in grasping the diverse dynamics of the Consignment .  To achieve this, an MRP Area must execute the Planning Processes separately using different parameters. I will use the standard Procurement Process via Forecast Planning or Planned Independent Requirements (PIR), and the Consignment Process will be managed by the Reorder Point method. By default, the Material "Coal" is already available with an MRP Area at the plant level (type 01). A new MRP Area (type 02) will be required to meet this requirement.

What is MRP Area?

The MRP area represents an organizational unit for which material requirements Planning is carried out independently. The following are the three different types of MRP area:

  • Plant MRP Area.
  • MRP Areas for Storage Locations.
  • MRP Areas for Subcontractors.

Please note, MRP Area for Subcontractor is not in-scope of this blog.

Six Steps to complete this process:

  • Define the MRP Area (type 02) at storage location level.
  • Configure the material master with the newly created MRP Area.
  • Assign different parameters to each MRP Area.
  • View two MRP Areas for the same material with different parameters.
  • Generate Planned Independent Requirements (PIR).
  • Execute MRP using MD01N.

 1.   Define the MRP Area (type 02) for storage location level.

By default, system creates plant as an MRP Area.

Please note that “MRP Area” type 01 represents MRP Area at plant level that is already available by default as shown below.

Define MRP Area below plant level to meet the business requirement.

Please note that “MRP Area” type 02 represents MRP Area for Storage location level as shown below.

Assign storage location to MRP Area.

Please note that only storage location 5002 is assigned to MRP Area CONSIGN.

The below screen shows that material “COAL” is already extended at two different storage locations for the same plant as shown below.

2.   Configure the material master with the newly created MRP Area.

Configure material master “COAL” for MRP Area type 02.

As shown above, after MRP Area type 02 assignment for storage location in configuration, the “MRP area exits” check box is checked automatically. When click “MRP area” button, a newly created MRP Area “CONSIGN” is also shown above in the “Overview, Display MRP Area”.

3.   Assign different parameters to each MRP Area.

Parameters for MRP Area NJD1.

MRP1-View.

MRP2-View.

Parameters for MRP Area CONSIGN.

MRP1-View.

MRP2-View.

4.   View two MRP Areas for the same material with different parameters.

Material master “Coal” with MRP Area NJD1 is showing below.

Material master “Coal” with MRP Area CONSIGN is showing.

5.   Generate Planned Independent Requirements (PIR).

For the demo purpose, using  MD61, PIR is generated for MRP Area NJD1 as shown below.

Using MD04, generation of PIR can be confirmed as shown below.

Please note, for MRP Area CONSIGN, no PIR is required.

6.   Execute MRP using MD01N.

Using MD01N, Planning  is executed and as a result both Purchase Requisitions are generated.

Via PIR (Forecast).

Via Reorder Point.

                                          MRP Overview Flow Chart.

entry.title: Adoption Session - Creating & Editing in SAP Companion Recap
entry.content:
Link to Creating & Editing in SAP Companion session recording. 

Link to Creating & Editing in SAP Companion book covered during this session. 

Below are the Q&A topics that came up during the session:

  • If editing icons do not appear, is that in the SEN configuration setup?
    • Yes, the editing icon is something that you can activate in the SAP Companion configuration setup, it's a parameter. NOTE that Companion configuration is not the same section than SEN Server configuration.
  • What's the difference between Show Instantly and Show Bubble as a callout?
    • Show Instantly governs the text bubble and Show Bubble governs the entire element (icon + text) it's best just to try the different options. One setting changes the resulting options.
  • Can you share the specific steps needed to connect a cloud Workarea and edit the Manager Companion help content?
    • Check out the SAP Help portal and review the Companion Integration Guide.
    • Note: Any time you edit standard SAP content, it becomes your own custom content, and you are responsible for maintaining it!
    • Check out the blog: Getting Started with SAP Companion 
  • Do you have any resources for the Insert Placeholder option in the Text field interface?
    • Review the SAP Companion Authoring Guide and search for "Placeholder" to find the information.
  • When editing Companion content, what do the red and green traffic lights mean on the tours?
    • Red means the tour or content has not been published yet and the green light means it has been published. 
  • When the spotlight on hotspot occurs, does it prevent user from clicking elsewhere?
    • No, it does not.
  • To capture context for your Companion content, so they show up in the correct place, please ensure you have the correct Extensions downloaded. Review Extensions Overview | SAP Help Portal
  • If you have questions about integration Companion with third party applications, please talk to your VCSP.

@paolagomez @jairoramirez @robert_way @Blake_Hill

entry.title: Re: TTA For SAP server installation
entry.content:
Hi,

all documentation regarding TTA integrated with SAP Solution Manager can be found via this note: 3015905 - Release Note for Tricentis Test Automation for SAP integrated with SAP Solution Manager 7.2 - SAP for Me

As well as via this help page: Tricentis Test Automation integrated with SAP Solution Manager 7.2 - TTA for SAP | SAP Help Portal

Here you can also find information regarding training on TTA integrated with SAP Solution Manager.

Thanks

entry.title: bgRFC units in Transportation Management
entry.content:
Dear Reader,

The purpose of this blog is to provide general information about Background Remote Function Call (bgRFC) processing and monitoring in Transportation Management (TM).

Before we explore how TM utilizes the bgRFC framework, you may find it helpful to learn about bgRFC technology. For more information visit SAP Help Portal page bgRFC (Background Remote Function Call) .

This documentation is valid for the following SAP Releases:

  • SAP Transportation Management 9.5 and 9.6
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud 1709 and above

 

bgRFC units in Transportation Management

In TM bgRFC units (=units) are mainly used to execute triggers and strategies in the background without blocking the main processing flow.

  • Trigger execution:
    Triggers are created when a document cannot be updated due to a locking conflict, that is, when there is a foreign enqueue lock on the business document, or when a related document must be updated asynchronously. In these cases, the system creates bgRFC units to execute the corresponding BOBF action or ABAP class on the target document at a later point in time. For a description of the predefined triggers, see Customizing for TM under Basic Functions > General Settings > Define Triggers.
    Details about trigger concept are available on SAP Help Portal page Processing of Triggers.
  • Asynchronous Strategy execution:
    Asynchronous Create, Save and Change strategies that are set for a Document Type are also executed in bgRFC units.

bgRFC unit execution is always asynchronous and automatic, but an error or improper configuration can cause issues with that. Issues with bgRFC processing leads to inconsistent documents or an exploding number of units, which can cause a business down situation. Therefore, regular monitoring of bgRFC units is strongly recommended.

 

Mandatory bgRFC Configuration

Transaction: SBGRFCCONF

  • Inbound destination TM_BGRFC_INBOUND must exist. If this destination is not available, it must be created manually as described in Application Operations Guide under section “Trigger Processing”. Alternatively, you can use Report /SCMTMS/TRIGGER_SETUP_BGRFC to create the inbound destination. All bgRFC units created by TM application will be registered for this destination.

bgRFC Configuration - Inbound destination TM_BGRFC_INBOUND

  • Supervisor destination must be defined. You can find information about creating supervisor destination on SAP Help Portal page Creating a Supervisor Destination or in SAP Note 2309399 - How to use SBGRFCCONF effectively?.

bgRFC Configuration – Supervisor destination

For additional information on general bgRFC configuration, please refer to SAP Note 2309399-How to use SBGRFCCONF effectively?

 

bgRFC unit monitoring

There are two tools available to monitor bgRFC units:

  • bgRFC Monitor (= Monitor)
  • TM bgRFC Analysis Tool (= Analysis Tool).

bgRFC Monitor is the official tool for the administration of bgRFC units. You can display all bgRFC units, however it does not provide any application-specific information.

bgRFC Analysis Tool was developed by the TM application team to understand the application data behind a bgRFC unit. Therefore, Analysis Tool can be used to understand the content of bgRFC units in inbound destination TM_BGRFC_INBOUND and to have some additional statistical information regarding these units.

There can always be unexpected issues or application errors that are not easy to detect. Therefore, checking the bgRFC units from time to time will help you identify and resolve any issues in time.

A few examples which may arise in your system:

  • You suspect a missing or late update on a document.
    For example, if a freight unit is modified but the changes are not reflected on the related freight document.
  • You encounter permanent locking conflict for a document.
    This occurs when you are unable to edit a freight document for a longer time because it has been locked by another user.
  • You notice frequent PPF processing.
    In transaction SM13 there are high number of unprocessed or failed update requests.
  • You detect failed bgRFC units.
    If trigger or strategy execution fails due to an application error.

 

bgRFC Monitor

Transaction: SBGRFCMON

bgRFC Monitor displays the available bgRFC units in the system. It is used to check the availability of bgRFC units in general and to perform operations if necessary, such as a restart or deletion of the selected units.

On the Selection Screen, there is no need to fill out any of the selection options. If you want to display all units, you may need to increase the number of displayed units with parameter “Maximum No. Of Displayed Units”. TM bgRFC units are displayed under inbound destination TM_BGRFC_INBOUND.

bgRFC Monitor – bgRFC units for destination TM_BGRFC_INBOUND

 

bgRFC Unit Statuses

Based on the lifecycle of a bgRFC unit, you can observe the following statuses in the bgRFC Monitor:

  • Executable bgRFC unit: is executed automatically.
  • Locked bgRFC unit: is not executed until the lock is removed.
  • Failed bgRFC unit: was executed but failed.

Executable bgRFC units

bgRFC Monitor – Executable bgRFC unit

When a unit is created, it is displayed in the bgRFC Monitor with a green icon and executed automatically. After successful execution the unit is marked for deletion and will be deleted from the database tables later. Units that are marked for deletion are not displayed in the bgRFC Monitor.

Locked bgRFC units

Locked bgRFC units are displayed with a yellow icon in the bgRFC Monitor. You can identify the type of lock based on “Manual Lock” or “Debug Lock” columns.

  • Manual Lock

bgRFC Monitor – bgRFC unit with manual lock

In the monitor, you see that "Manual Lock" is checked. These units are delayed. This is a predefined delay which can be different for each unit. Once the specified delay expires for a unit, that unit is automatically “unlocked” and becomes executable.

  • Debug Lock

    bgRFC Monitor – bgRFC units with debug lock

In the monitor, you see that "Debug Lock" is checked. These units are permanently locked. A debug lock is set only if the process was debugged by a developer. The administrator must unlock them manually to have them executed.


Failed bgRFC units

bgRFC Monitor –Failed bgRFC unit

When a unit fails, it is displayed in the bgRFC Monitor with a red icon.
Failed units are never processed automatically. After resolving the error, the administrator must unlock them manually to have them executed again.

 
bgRFC Unit Lifecycle in Transportation Management

Once there is a need to register a trigger or a strategy, a new executable bgRFC unit is created. After successful execution the bgRFC unit is deleted. Technically, the bgRFC Unit is marked for deletion and only at a later point in time deleted permanently. You can specify the deletion time with parameter “Unit Delete Time (s)” in bgRFC Configuration.

During execution the system places an enqueue lock on the corresponding document.
In case the system cannot lock the document, the actual bgRFC unit is deleted and a new locked bgRFC unit is created. At this point, you will see the bgRFC unit with manual lock in the bgRFC Monitor. After, the predefined delay expires the unit is unlocked and executed.

There are two parameters set for the new locked unit:
- a retry counter which shows the number of the execution attempts
- a delay time which is determined based on the retry counter.

The retry counter is increased after each execution attempt. To avoid endless repetition, a maximum allowed number of retries is defined. When this number is reached, the actual bgRFC unit fails and no new unit is created. The maximum number of allowed retries is a TM specific parameter that is different from the parameter “Max. Auto. Retries” in bgRFC Configuration.

If any error occurs during execution the bgRFC unit fails.

 
Manual operations in bgRFC Monitor

As mentioned before, sometimes manual intervention is needed to unlock a bgRFC unit. This can be done for a single or for multiple units.

Single Operation

bgRFC Monitor – Delete unit lock for a single bgRFC unit

 

  1. Right click the selected bgRFC unit
  2. Choose “Delete Unit Lock”

Mass Operation

bgRFC Monitor – Delete unit lock for all selected bgRFC units

 

  1. Right click “Transactional Units”
  2. Choose “Mass Operations”
  3. Choose “Unblock Type T Units in Filter”

The parameter “Maximum No. of Displayed Units” is not considered during mass operation. All units that fulfils the selection criteria will be processed.

 

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool

Report: /SCMTMS/BGRFC_ANALYSE
Transaction: /SCMTMS/BGRFC

There might be cases when you need to know which business documents are processed by a bgRFC unit. If you are interested in such application information, you can use the TM bgRFC Analysis Tool.

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool – Selection Screen

The tool can display bgRFC units that are created under inbound destination TM_BGRFC_INBOUND.

The selection may take some time, especially, if you set a high number for “Max. No. of units”. In this case, you should execute the report as a background job and select option “Statistics, no details”.

 
Statistics in TM bgRFC Analysis Tool

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool – TM bgRFC Unit Statistics

After executing the report, you can find generic unit statistics on the right-hand side in section “TM bgRFC Unit Statistics”. These values are taken from the bgRFC Performance Monitor, which is also accessible through transaction SBGRFCPERFMON. The values are independent from the given selection criteria.

  • “Total” field shows the total number of available units. This includes all failed, locked, executable units, as well as units that are already marked for deletion.
  • “SYSFAIL State” shows the number of failed units.
  • “Executable” field shows the number of units that are waiting for execution or are being executed.

In the Totals, Top 10s and Statistics sections you can view the aggregated statistics based on different grouping criteria. These sections help you to detect if there is a specific trigger, strategy, or document that has an abnormal number of units.

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool – Statistics – Totals and Top 10

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool – Statistics – Statistics per Document Category

  • “Totals – Triggers” and “Totals – TOR Strategy” sections display how many business documents are registered for a certain trigger or strategy.
  • “Top 10 – Users” and “Top 10 – Documents” sections list the users or documents having the highest number of activities from bgRFC unit perspective.
  • “Trigger statistics – Per Document Category” and “TOR Strategy statistics – Per Document Category” sections show the triggers and strategies with the highest number of bgRFC units per document category.

Columns with suffix “(Example)” contains values taken from a random entry for that specific statistics group.

 
Unit details in TM bgRFC Analysis Tool

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool – Unit details – Overview

If you are interested in the application data behind a bgRFC unit, you can access this information by selecting either “Statistics with details” or “Only details in ALV” option on the selection screen.

Here, you see the retry counter, the state and the error messages for each unit, which provide information about the lifecycle status of a bgRFC unit:

  • Executable units are displayed without any State or Error Message.
  • Failed units have an error message in the Error Message column.
  • Locked units with manual lock have “* Delayed” value in the State column and a non-zero value in the Retry count column. If you select the “Display technical fields” option on the selection screen, the Delay Valid Until column shows the validity of the delay.

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool – Unit details – Delayed unit

  • Locked units with debug lock have a "Locked" value in the State column.

TM bgRFC Analysis Tool – Locked unit

  • Deleted bgRFC units have state “Deleted”. Once the bgRFC unit is permanently deleted, it will no longer be visible in the bgRFC Analysis Tool.

 

An example of trigger creation and monitoring:

Quantity is changed on a forwarding order while the assigned freight order is locked by a parallel process. In this case, the change cannot be propagated synchronously and the freight order can only be updated asynchronously by the TOR_UPDATE_FROM_RELATED_TOR trigger.

The executable unit is visible in the Analysis Tool. If the unit can be executed without any issues, you can see the unit with status Deleted.

In case of a locking conflict, this trigger cannot be executed. You see each execution attempt with an increasing Retry counter. For each execution attempt, there is a corresponding deleted bgRFC Unit.

The trigger is executed once the locking conflict is resolved. After successful execution, the forwarding order changes are visible on the freight order.

 

The Tool is delivered in the following SAP Notes:

  • For releases higher than or equal to S/4HANA 1809, use SAP Note 3343351 - bgRFC: Technical Correction, Analysis Tool 11.
  • For releases TM 9.5, TM 9.6, S/4HANA 1709, use SAP Note 3342574 - bgRFC: Analysis Tool with Checkpoint Group 1.

Global activation of Checkpoint Group /SCMTMS/BGRFC_REG is a prerequisite to catch the unit details. bgRFC units that are created while the Checkpoint Group is inactive will not be listed in the Analysis Tool.


Contribute to the content!

Thank you for reading my blog post. I hope it has helped you understand how bgRFC units are processed and how you can monitor them for Transportation Management. Feel free to explore the world of TM bgRFC units and post any processing or monitoring related question.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to define an input as an optional fiel...
entry.content: Hi @Dan_Wroblewski,

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: Filter current date on Source in DataFlow
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP note 3320662 - Date calculation in filter in SAP Datasphere. Any workaround?
